Damiano Damiani's film excellent reason look beyond holy "Dollars" trinity.
Deranged gold, hot-blooded passion, whiskey, revolutionary fervor, moral compass spins wildly throughout Damiano Damiani's Bullet General, gray-hearted spaghetti western that more closely resembles Cormac McCarthy's Blood Meridian Alex Cox's 1987 film Walker than flagship titles subgenre, Sergio Leone's "Dollars" trilogy.
band Mexican rebels, wild-eyed Chuncho" (Gian Maria Volonté), wanders across Mexican countryside with vague plan murder ransack Mexican army then sell their spoils nameless revolutionary general.
During train heist that opens film, they're joined gringo Bill Tate (baby-faced Castel, then breakout star, thanks Marco Bellocchio's Fists Pocket), whose motives remain unclear until much later film, when stakes have been reweighed shifted.
most shocking moments violence western genre takes place wordless opening Howard Hawks's Bravo, coldblooded killing that sets barometric pressure much what comes after.
killings Damiani's film often characterized same callous unfairness, many rebel band's victims include unarmed civilians injured soldiers.
case, wealthy landowner's death sentence passed, carried during narrative ellipsis, that don't know what happened until camera passes over corpse during wind-down drunken revelry.
rebels quite clearly love proletariat (peasants prostitutes alike) much they hate both bourgeoisie paid army, Tate dresses impeccably, wearing suit pair leather gloves, manner Jack Nicholson Monte Hellman's Shooting gradually begins hint that he's agenda that might healthy anarcho-hedonist spirit Chuncho's crew.
Mexico filmed Spain, like Leone's westerns, Bullet General balances dizzying moral abyss with stunning landscape photography keen compositional sense.
Even during complex battle scenes, Damiani, with editor Renato Cinquini, keeps line action causality clear, which more remarkable since it's frequently difficult keep clear picture where characters heading, what everyone seems want, what they're actually thinking.
When momentum lags, contrast between leads' performance styles Volonté's silent-cinema intensity Castel's vampiric knowing-ness more than enough keep things afloat.
mixed bag.
When screen filled with vastness open roads rocky terrain, Blue Underground's high-definition transfer, which uses nearly flawless materials, quite glorious.
When humans enter frame, especially during night scenes, faces objects seem little frayed, though there isn't much evidence edge enhancement.
Nevertheless, this gets pass sheer vividness clarity colors, jaw-dropping wide shots.
mono tracks (English Italian, though difference often negligible, since characters frequently switch English Spanish with explanation) strong resonant, given imperfections original recording mixing.
commentary here, Blue Underground honest work including interview with Damiano Damiani, bonus disc containing "Gian Maria Volonté: Attore Contro," entertaining informative documentary vastly underrated star movies directors varied Sergio Leone, Jean-Pierre Melville, Francesco Rosi, Elio Petri.
Clips from Volonté's work shown, well tributes collaborators.
disc with Attore Contro" DVD; Blu-ray presents Bullet General both 118-minute international version, well U.S. release version, which three minutes shorter.
know spaghetti western Sergio Leone, Damiano Damiani's Bullet General, presented largely satisfactory Blu-ray from Blue Underground, excellent reason look beyond holy "Dollars" trinity.

watch doors from transit centre open again again, disgorging children, families, elderly woman walker, wonder arrived.
Suddenly lanky young person squeezed between packs small bright strapped chest, huge grey hiking pack bowed over shoulders.
recognise cheeky face instant, laconic grin splitting thickened brown beard.
"He's here, he's here!!"
scream, slam door open this man, always son.
stops, wrap arms around (and packs) best can, absorbing feel wiry frame, scent travel weariness.
"Yes Mum.
here" sighs, smile sneaking through stubble.
sister joins group hug, and, joined, crab towards car.
"We've dinner waiting", say.
With that statement, years separation slough off, returns home.
see, lived away over seven years.
Firstly, another city, then another country.
back enjoy Australia's summer, camp beach, walk through bush, catch with friends family.
plans bask expanse blue white sand, missing other country's grey skies deep snow.
Over dinner table laugh reconnect with first sentences, settle listen avidly this young man's stories adventures.
relaxed,
comfort with another, slip back into roles old.
adult, home also child.
older brother teenage sister, playful, gentle, tween once was.
spends hours with middle-aged dogs, puppies forever eyes.
Only time with cherished grandfather different, they share compare tales travel between now, then.
Secretly, guiltily, relish son's company single person.
I've discovered that when your child takes partner, your time with that child, alone, rare.
However.
Although don't share time with girlfriend, share time with friends.
many mates, many places.
much such limited time.
Christmas Eve, family travels mother's place, hours away from home.
Three vehicles roll into driveway.
swing doors open, hear crunch gravel people grab their suitcases head front door, laughing, chatting.
Memories Christmases gone immerse experience again excitement anticipation childhood long gone.
mind's Mum, leaning over blue balcony, eyes crinkling upwards, smile wide, laughter burbling, ready share generous hospitality revel family.
where Christmas become time honour those longer breathe, live within
"She would have loved this," whisper myself.
hostess with most-est.
Looking veranda, grandchildren helped create, thank her.
"Look your grandson, Mum.
extended family spends four languid days together.
play board games, talk, walk dogs beach.
When can, gaze surreptitiously young son, try, desperately, absorb voice, laugh, attention grandfather's tales.
imprint memory, sight sister brother, heads leaning each other, embodying respectful, lasting, sibling love?
company tinged, ever slightly, with sense sadness.
Each here, closer when leaves.
mindful?
present, discover myself drawn furtively digital world.
shocked saddened pull screen
Then young people, swiping, side-by-side after months apart.
Before comment, child turns other, realise their screens launching discussion, commonality.
withdraw judgement note hypocrisy!
bounces from home friends home more friends.
frenetic desire experience new-found appreciation country birth.
Each time leaves, comforted that will back couple days.
Until know won't back
who-knows-how-long.
palace farewells airport.
squeeze only tight will allow, look him, drinking sadness threatening sweep through bones.
realise that even embrace "farewell", prepare myself "hello".
That will two-dimensioned self again, soon, chat technology.
That will remain connected until meet again, flesh.
This "goodbye".
Thank friend, also mother adult son, whose musings suggested title this piece.

Foot creams lotions moisturizers meant relieve dryness, soften skin, reduce roughness heal cracked heels.
People usually foot creams very skin that needs aggressive moisturizing treatment.
Foot lotions typically used daily basis combat mild skin, keep feet feeling soft moisturized time.
most part, foot lotions foot creams same terms their function purpose, they have individual properties that make them distinctly different.
Foot creams made ratio water oil, while foot lotions contain much less even resulting much thinner consistency.
Many ingredients used commercially manufactured foot moisturizers actually more harm than good.
Along with many other personal care products, consumers turning natural foot care over their standard commercially made lotions creams.
Natural foot cream recipes made multitude combinations, most often consisting beeswax, natural butters oils, such shea butter coconut oil, well essential oils such tree peppermint oil.

Ipamorelin, synthetic peptide derived from GHRP-1, made five amino acids
Ipamorelin powerful growth hormone releasing peptide capable causing potent growth hormone release
Ipamorelin stimulates release growth hormone activating ghrelin receptor found brain.
Activating this receptor increasing levels growth hormone within body modulate food intake energy metabolism also influences glucose metabolism
Growth hormone secretion also increases appetite causes increased lean muscle growth
Ipamorelin been demonstrated highly specific growth hormone stimulator since does lead increases prolactin, hormone, luteinizing hormone, thyroid-stimulating hormone
Furthermore, peptide does cause adrenocorticotropic hormone cortisol stimulation.
Therefore, compared other growth hormone stimulators, such GHRP-2 GHRP-6, ipamorelin more specific growth hormone stimulator.
Animal studies have shown that ipamorelin counteract reduction bone muscle strength
human trials, ipamorelin shown induce substantial dose dependent growth hormone release healthy males
Another human study also determined that ipamorelin strongly induces growth hormone release over range doses that half-life peptide hours
summary, ipamorelin potent growth hormone stimulator that does broadly affect additional biochemical pathways like some other GHRPs.
optimal ipamorelin stack with doses other growth hormone releasing peptides, such GHRP-2, GHRP-6 hexarelin.
Ipamorelin dosed once twice daily dosages should spread over course hours.
Ipamorelin been acutely administered humans mcg/kg with adverse effects reported.
peptide also been administered mcg/kg twice daily days well tolerated
highly specific actions ipamorelin give positive safety profile side effects when using ipamorelin recommended dose generally minimal, although headaches have been reported.
